comment: vue-tsc typecheck of the app + SFC components. @symbiotejs/* resolve to source (the monorepo's by-design source resolution), so this also re-checks adapter/engine source — `types: [node]` restores the runtime globals (setTimeout/process/console/queueMicrotask) the app tsconfig strips with `types: []`. e2e/ is excluded: Detox tests with jest globals, type-checked via ts-jest.
